visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Medium shot of a young woman in a white high-neck blouse standing against a light beige curtain background. Large yellow text "真相 PART 3" and "劇本1" are overlaid on the screen. She maintains a neutral, serious facial expression while looking directly at the lens. (2) She begins speaking while holding a printed white document in her hands, her facial movements indicating speech. Lower-third captions in white and yellow appear at the bottom. The lighting is bright and even studio-style. (3) She presents two pieces of white paper to the camera, gesturing towards them as if displaying evidence. The camera remains static. She points at the text on the paper with her fingers. (4) A young man wearing a black shirt suddenly enters from the right side of the frame. He is cheering loudly with high-energy gestures, including high-fiving the woman and raising his arm in a triumphant "Yes" pose. (5) The woman and man stand together, looking down at the script document. The man gestures wildly with his hands while the woman smiles and waves at the camera. The background remains consistent beige curtains.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 真相 PART 3. [Slogan]: 劇本1. [Subtitle]: 嘎哥把逆轉劇本寫好了 接下來就靠你至已了+0. (2) [Subtitle]: 親愛的粉絲朋友們大家好 我是+0. (3) [Subtitle]: 今天有幾個劇本 要跟大家來說明. (4) [Subtitle]: 劇本1 侵占款項事件. (5) [Subtitle]: 首先 要跟大家鄭重宣布. (6) [Subtitle]: 其實ANDY是張爸張媽的親生兒子. (7) [Subtitle]: 我們是在32年前的嬰兒室裡 被抱錯的嬰兒. (8) [Subtitle]: 證據在這邊. (9) [Subtitle]: 我手上這張是張爸張媽跟ANDY的DNA鑑定報告. (10) [Subtitle]: 報告顯示他們 99.99%有親子關係. (11) [Subtitle]: 大家如果不相信這個DNA鑑定 可以把ANDY這個名字 A-N-D-Y倒過來念. (12) [Variety]: Y-DNA. [Variety]: Y就是Yes. [Variety]: Yes DNA. (13) [Subtitle]: 證明了這個DNA Yes! 鑑定是對的. (14) [Subtitle]: 所以張爸張媽是為了以後要把遺產留給ANDY 才先把所有營收 都先匯進群海娛樂. (15) [Subtitle]: 淑惠的用心良苦 著實令人動容. (16) [Subtitle]: 請大家原諒這對愛子心切的父母 他們只是太愛ANDY. (17) [Variety]: Yes 可以.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator (Jianing), 1 male creator (Cai Aga) appearing later.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A female with long brown hair wearing a white high-neck minimalist blouse. A male with short hair wearing a black casual t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A plain, light-colored beige curtain serves as the backdrop, providing a neutral and clean studio environment.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice initiates the narration with clear articulation and a moderate pitch, sounding like a formal announcement or a serious clarification. The vocal arousal is low, conveying a professional persona. A soft, sentimental piano background music with a slow tempo plays underneath the speech, creating a calm, slightly melancholic acoustic atmosphere. (2) A sharp, high-frequency "ding" sound effect punctuates the track as a text graphic appears on screen. The female voice continues her delivery with consistent cadence and enunciated clarity, while the ambient noise floor remains studio-clean silence with no audible interference or environmental hum. (3) The background music experiences a subtle volume swell, leaning into a tonal framework that suggests dramatic importance. The female speaker's intensity remains moderate, with few structural pauses, maintaining a steady informational flow as she explains the details of a "script." (4) A loud, explosive male voice suddenly interrupts the track with extremely high vocal arousal and high pitch variability, shouting "Yes!" with significant intensity. This is followed by a "whoosh" transition sound effect, marking a sharp contrast in the audio texture from the previous calm narration. (5) The audio culminates in a hyper-dense sequence of high-energy vocalizations from the male speaker, who shouts repeatedly with high spectral brightness. The female speaker joins in with an animated tone, while the music remains energetic amidst the loud, enthusiastic celebratory chatter and laughter.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Introduction -> Narrative Explanation -> Comedic Resolution
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a satirical parody of a clarification or apology video. It uses the framing of 'Script 1' to present a humorous and absurd explanation for a real-life controversy involving the creator (Cai Aga) and a former employee. By having the female character read a ridiculous 'script' in a serious tone, it mocks the idea of fabricated public relations stories.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video features creators Cai Aga and Jianing. It is a comedic response to public controversy using a meta-narrative about 'scripts'.
